name: qr-code-ai
description: Qr Code Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: generate_qr_data
tools.description: Generate QR code data from text/URL. Returns matrix or text-art representation.

tools.name: decode_qr_data
tools.description: Analyze a QR matrix (JSON 2D array) and extract metadata.

tools.name: create_vcard_qr
tools.description: Generate vCard data suitable for QR encoding.

tools.name: create_wifi_qr
tools.description: Generate WiFi QR code data for network sharing.
